/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libOblique.so -o libOblique.so CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/core/engine/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/core/log/log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/core/window/glfw_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/GraphicsPipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/Render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/RenderPass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/Swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/VmaImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/src/rhi/vulkan/VulkanRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/thirdparty/volk/volk.c.o "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Oblique.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o"  -lglfw -ldl _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlogd.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
